His attention to detail is beyond exceptional. Always asks the right questions and goes above and beyond.

Pro Contractors will be my go to company now and in the future.

I wish I had more contractors like Jeff and his team at Pro Contractors to work with throughout Western Canada.

We at A.S.A.P. Contracting Services Ltd. highly recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike Dawe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVSV2TYymrqonrQ_Mu_I4ltEecsiGiFZ-ZXXe-cvq4UmOAKg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I hired Jeff and his team for extensive upgrades of our 35+ year old house, and we couldn't have been happier with the results. Throughout the entire process they were professional, patient, thorough, and more importantly trustworthy, this extends to all the sub-trades that Jeff uses as well. By the end of it all our kids knew Jeff as Uncle Jeff, and were sad when the work was finished and they weren't coming around anymore (Jeff still pops in for coffee periodically though).

When the reno began, we only had a rough idea of what we wanted, but not only did Jeff and his crew have good ideas, once ideas were presented, they would give us ample time to make a decision without being pushy in any way, moreover, Jeff seemed to spend ample time mulling over the rough plans back at home, and would frequently be in contact with us so we could bounce ideas off each other. It seemed like no project began without looking at it from every angle, how it would present visually, but also how the design would function in our day to day life. At the end of each project, if something wasn't maybe quite what we had in mind, Jeff would make it right.....every time.....without fail.

Pro Contractors were recommended to us by friends of ours who used them to re-do their kitchen, as well as a local Draftsman we know, who told us that Jeff would be his #1 choice to tackle the project we had in mind. Both of them were spot on in their recommendations, and we wouldn't hesitate to use their services again.

Update 2 years later......

Contacted Jeff regarding one of the plumbing fixtures needing warranty work(no fault of Jeff at all), I wasn't expecting him to do any of the actual work on the repair, just needed to know if I had to go through him as it was purchased under his account, turns out I didn't have to. I thanked him for his time and we all went on our merry way, now unbeknownst to me, by the time I contacted the distributor the next morning, Jeff already had the part on order for me with the warranty details already taken care of, just goes to show that once you're a customer of Jeff and his team, you're always a customer, still can't recommend these guys enough!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tracey Horner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJC4IsKv_JIlo4eg4mQV7tSB0VxAy5cnIQGMY5CfiJeiMpj_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jeff and his crew did a remarkable job on my home renovations. It was a challenging job and I was very pleased with the results. The guys were courteous, friendly and kept my home clean while they worked. I would highly recommend Pro Contractors to anyone who needs work done. I also want to mention that Jeff was fair and kept costs as per our contract. Give them a try, you won’t regret it!

Tracey Horner","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Blair Vanstone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFSwaAiyxXEB-zv8PSMIyY6tMyzqfeYK5FgdTjkkMTgkYjtg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jeff and the team at Pro-Contractors Ltd. have been amazing to work with.  They worked with us from the design stage, got our permits with the city approved, and executed on time and budget.  Can't say enough about Jeff and the team.  I would recommend Pro Contractors Ltd. to anyone!  They really helped make the vision a reality!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marla D'Arcy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIrn4aP-CyfnVyvpT-kkSrpt6oImeJ7CgHbz3NlsT-ijwL8FA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am so happy with the work Jeff did on my back deck and stairs.  If I could give 10 stars I would.  Pro contractors were so professional, kind, timely, and organized.  All my questions were answered and I felt that I was treated with great kindness and respect.  I have already hired them to d more projects at my house.  Thank you Pro Contractors.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sheri Morita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGlKjMt-0vTaZQOJDyBHTx0c_7kyx-aU2jW2y6_iaC_wSF5f8V=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jeffrey at Pro Contractors did a very professional job rebuilding our failing deck, including helping with the city to ensure the permitting process got done. Jeff is a true professional in every sense of the word and we would not hesitate to work with him again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karan Bhatti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI53w6w6nHidt_7wWA0FLRMHoL1RIOuo9EP50jlHoED2B3DUQg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Jeff at Pro Contractors for our Showroom’s initial build and for multiple other expansions. It took a little longer to get the glass & have it installed than we thought it would take, but a  service person came from Klein Windows & completed the job within 35- 40 minutes. Great repore Highly recommend Service Master.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ian Chabassol","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLKZMwLOPND92MF1BSc9H_JQFJFknG9VA4mKCsb9D7LFWzMFw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They were sent out for a restore/repair job via our insurance company. While initially responding fairly quickly, they packed up way more of our stuff then was needed, and never informed us of how to go about retrieving our things if we need them. We finally phoned them as it’s now been 2 months (mainly our insurance company dragging their feet, but they have left their unused equipment here as well, and have not proceeded with any repairs at all yet) and asked where we can retrieve some of our things we are very much missing. We were told to expect an email with a detailed document list that has still never arrived. Overall, not impressed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard Lessing","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJ1XsW-UU6GsNBL2NALJhlLf1gMc9NwXHq4nTUw3nFAIFsGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Restore Team
I wanted to take the time to share my positive experience with the demo portion of my basement restoration after the water damage. Shane, Dan, and Darcy were absolutely amazing—professional, courteous, and thorough. They made sure I was kept informed and updated throughout the entire process, which I truly appreciated.
I would also like to recognize the moving crew, led by Silvino, who was incredibly attentive and ensured that all of our personal items were handled with the utmost care and respect. Sati, Jot, Richard, Kiko, Irish, and Charmaine worked exceptionally hard packing our belongings, and I can’t thank them enough for their dedication and effort.
Overall, I’m so grateful that ServiceMaster Restore was able to assist during this very stressful time. Your team’s professionalism, compassion, and attention to detail made the entire experience much less overwhelming.
Thank you again to everyone involved for your outstanding service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"tushar thukral","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvXKtcP9F9nEaoelHkDVWdzHg1UcXWyllFEqQGK_dOmUmMeA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Arnold Stoffer did an excellent job with the emergency equipment setup. He was professional, efficient, and very clear in explaining everything. The work was completed smoothly and on time. Highly appreciate his support and would definitely recommend his services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Libby Warkentin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2qEwjV5S4nTrSShunuQiWPK8Oi3vBzkqU5v3vqm2Zs73l7w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We had a very good experience with this company. They responded quickly to a leak in our kitchen, troubleshooting and remediating the problem in a timely manner. Once the restoration work began, the trades all showed up when we expected them, were courteous and friendly and did a great job. The cleaners/unpackers Donna and Nancy were particularly helpful and went above and beyond, being very thorough.
The one thing that happened was an accidental scraping of our newly refinished floor when the appliances were moved back in which delayed the finish of the project. This was disappointing to say the least, but they noticed it themselves and had the floor resanded and refinished within a week or so and were very apologetic.
I would recommend them as a company that is attentive, sympathetic and competent during a stressful time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D Whitford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLwzXjIaKFxYEjsV4IzXP8IhDh2UxDvQ-Xvh-E3O-87yyH66RU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On the morning of Aug. 27th, we discovered a damp spot on the laundry room floor. Upon further investigation, we could see water was running down from the ceiling and wall to the floor. We immediately called ServiceMaster and were put in touch with Dan Turnbull, a field project manager. We explained our situation, and he suggested a plumber to do the emergency repairs and mitigate the damage. Later that day, Dan arrived on site to inspect the damage and took moisture readings and pictures of the affected areas. Soon afterwards a team showed up with protective floor coverings, fans and dehumidifiers to again mitigate the damage and prevent the growth of mold.
The leak was found to be caused from a Poly-B failure in the ceiling between the bottom and upper floors. We decided it would be prudent to remove and replace all the Poly-B in the house, as future failure was bound to happen. Dan Turnbull guided us through all the steps, from plumbing, drywalling, flooring, painting, and finishing. There were times when multiple trades were on site at the same time, we found all of them to be courteous and work well together.
In the end, we are happy with the outcome and would recommend ServiceMaster for prompt and efficient repairs.

Special thanks to:
Levi Johnston and Sammy from Fort Plumbing. We lucked out when we chose your team to do the Poly-B replacement, very professional and personable.

Timothy Dobbs and Dan from Stellar Services. The drywalling, painting and finishing from the initial water damage and the multiple repairs for the Poly-B replacement were exceptional. Your ability to work around other trades and keep on schedule is to be commended, and thank you for the extras.

Tim Surbey from All About Floors. Kudos to your team for going above and beyond by removing and replacing the appliances to get the new flooring installed.

And again, thanks to Dan Turnbull and Jennifer Fulton at ServiceMaster.","Images":null,"When":""}]

This gets even better! Ironically, this day we experienced a winter storm which was very windy and they worked through it. On the next day as they are finishing up on the job I’ve noticed my hot water tank isn’t working, so I’ve asked Jonathan if it was ok for him to help me to take a look at it.  Of course he did without any hesitations. The problem with my hot water tank was that due to the storm it created a water leak from the roof and must have  put out the pilot light. I was very luck to have Jonathan and Daryl there at that same time as they fixed the leak without any extra charge! Who does this now?  Please support A1 roofing, they are not only polite, professional but they actually care about their clients. [{"Name":"kelsey ellison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7__7FgsPRKDo_i0AcYEUNtRSQ9_8tiaFyOqafEzOt_-5tsg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our new townhome inspected by Daniel from Mr. Home Inspector and he was honestly amazing. Super friendly, super patient, and incredibly thorough. He showed up with everything including a ladder, tools, a moisture and heat gun, and an iPad for photos and he checked every little thing you can think of.

What we appreciated most was how he walked us through everything afterward. He didn’t just hand us a report; he actually taught us about our home, pointed out things to keep an eye on, and explained it all in a way that made sense. As first time homeowners, that meant a lot.

His pricing was very reasonable, especially for the amount of detail and care he put in. On top of that, he was so flexible when our possession date got delayed. He answered calls and emails quickly and made rescheduling super easy.

We would absolutely recommend Daniel to anyone needing a home inspection. Knowledgeable, kind, and genuinely helpful. Thanks again Daniel, you made this part of the process so much less stressful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lidia Balint","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLF_q0lutzFiZvCKPbPCUAJjm5mtMYdLrNASLH105SL558zOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ryan Mason is amazing. An important email regarding my questions about gutters was not responded to for a month (when I asked Marc about this at the job site he said that they would return in the summer to install a repair). I will update this review if they do return.

As far as the budget is concerned, they are reasonable and competitive. I recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Philip Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvl5lRRE5K1QsX0ymlBRJDfa05AwfitfsQc1REwp1HVB8AJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Glen Rowley, Enviroshake Regional Sales Manager BC, WA, & OR recommended Peakmasters inc. to install the Enviroshake shake roof based on my stipulations.
I have a bit of knowledge about Enviroshake shakes and the installation process. Based on my prior experiences as a homeowner's representative dealing with installers and overseeing the roof installations, choosing the right company to re-roof my own home would be a challenge.
Marc Barre, CEO & Owner of Peakmasters Inc. performed an on-site inspection, addressed my concerns and more importantly my wife's concerns. Trust was our primary concern and Marc removed the fear of choosing the right roofing company for our home.
The roofing crew headed by Elmer was impressive! They were professional, prompt, efficient, knowledgeable, hardworking, and completed the re-roofing job installing the Enviroshake aged cedar colour shakes with Lamenco ridge venting on time as promised. It was a breath of fresh air watching an experienced crew working together synchronizing their skills in their trade.
Luke, Marc's son dropped off more material for the job and told me that he is working with his father, learning the trade and sticking with it for the long haul. This is great news to hear about Peakmasters long-term growth when the Enviroshake shakes comes with a limited lifetime warranty that is fully transferable within the first 50 years.
I have dealt with countless contractors in the building trade, Peakmasters Inc. is a top-tier company in my books.

I would highly recommend Peakmasters Inc.

Philip Wong
North Vancouver","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Saskia Wells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJxEQmN2hLepZZSgzKOWKnvxdDmZbbyWTLCFgouYauOt8Wxnw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give zero stars, I would.
JDM replaced our roof approximately two years ago, and it is already leaking. A roof should not fail this quickly,regardless of any warranty.
Although they claim to offer a 10-year warranty, we did not trust them to repair the damage because:
1.	A roof should never be leaking after 2–3 years, and
2.	We previously asked them to fix other issues, which were never properly addressed.

The leaks have been occurring for some time and resulted in mouldy insulation that had to be fully replaced. Another roofing company inspected the attic and documented multiple serious issues, including:
•	Incorrectly installed flashing causing leaks
•	An extractor vent they installed that caused cold drafts
•	Mould on the attic walls
•	Additional installation problems that should never have passed inspection

I contacted the owner directly and provided photo evidence. He refused to take responsibility and then stopped responding entirely. The bare minimum would have been a reply.
Based on how the owner has responded to other negative reviews, I expect he may try to deflect blame here as well, but the facts remain:
A roof should not leak after only a couple of years.
We are now paying out of pocket to fix problems that should never have existed in the first place.
Do not hire this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve McCartney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSqhIrSnUZ25U2qdrVY-Dt-FYhwnF7LpCQAW_KJKEsy-CDEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"During the most recent atmospheric river, our cabin's roof started to leak. I called several places but didn't get a response. I called JDM and spoke to Jim. This was done right on time and the problem was fixed. The next day part 2 of the atmospheric river started and our roof was leak free. We had a great experience with JDM and full heartedly endorse JDM as a company that is trustworthy and professional.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelly Obermayer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnxOIq54fInOxvpJF_bpcKCakRcXrb97q8WLiP-AQjeW713Ok=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you, Jim. They provided great workmanship on the  installation of the shingles, even staying late to get the job done. The quality of the product is one of the best. We are so happy with the finished product. Again, thank you for everything.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb2JzIOg&fid=0x0:0xf67edbecabe344db"],"When":"2024-8-1"},{"Name":"Steve Phillips","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKgUCFdjeDcuoyjjxDwpgGiK_ox9UQ_9MPHJAM0g6c1n_knQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a small leak from a 30 year old skylight. Five stars and two thumbs up!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clint Hames","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2gjC2QXy-9uPTqgDceiMJw2Mfg53FPGxg1TNamWlPWbP_Ew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Completely happy with the quality, speed and cost of our new roof.  All commitments met or exceeded.  Great job and many thanks.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trashthis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFfu2eFgQnSy2KrlBsRv6Av-vQbxb8kqftQppVZUKycFNeCDc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just recently had our roof replaced by JDM roofing. Jim was friendly and always prompt at returning phone calls and getting the roof installed in a timely manner 5/5!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Terry Touchette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKNsTPY42NQxYGeHp6Flasuv_6WU-3v6_LEIo23xJc0fV6VxE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Called for an estimate, Jim came out waked around the house, answered a couple questions I had, said he would be back in a few days with the estimate.  Week later, I messaged him for an update on the quote,  messaged back he would be there tomorrow morning.  No show again wasted my time waiting around.  If you don’t want the job just say so.

Reply to your reply.
You came on a Saturday, said in your message you would get me the estimate by Wednesday, when you left you said you would have it to me on Thursday.  Nothing from you for over week.  I messaged you Monday night looking for an update. You replied, it’s done I will drop it off in the morning.  I waited around all morning, changing my schedule around.  You didn’t show up, no messages, no communication at all. I then wrote the review.  I then went on with my day.  Came home to an envelope on my door step. So yes I guess you did get me my estimate thanks.  Guess you saw the negative review and then dropped it off.

As for roofer time.
The other company I got a quote from. Set a time for the inspection. Showed up when they said they would. Actually inspected the roof and my attic spaces. Then set up a time for the estimate.  Showed up on time for the estimate and provided it to me in a professional manner.

You may do good work I will never personally known, but you get the one star for lack of communication.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lee & Caroline Marshall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9Wui-AoKXWRY0ZHEpLKY2V9VnQMTKal-4noxVBjrCPaplXg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We would like to thank JDM for their exceptional work on replacing our roof and putting a new roof on our extension. It is without hesitation that we would recommend them to anyone needing their services. Thank you so much everyone for your work and making what could have been a stressful situation so easy. Your crew are amazing. We really appreciated how they cleaned the site after the job was completed.","Images":null,"When":""}]

After inspecting both the attic and rooftop by two inspectors I received an estimate including pictures and a full description of what was required… seven of nine vents required replacing, cracking due to weather conditions over the fourteen years we’ve been in our new home. A couple of days later all nine vents were replaced and the entire roof was recapped along with examining the rest of the roof for any other issues which were touched up. Again, everyone was friendly, polite and professional. Cleanup afterwards was spotless. I’m very thankful and relieved with how they handled everything including my anxiety. I told them I would be happy to give a referral but only after the weather once again got bad as a final test and again, David understood and totally agreed. Bob","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juliet Kerr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdwQEg8d_MO1Tt-h_CjcS6-9JvoLheq1Rt0GBzyLBdp8SnzPK7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For something as daunting as replacing the roof of your home, Dave and his team made this process seamless from start to finish! He uses top quality materials, is professional, and delivers exactly what he promises.

On top of that, his price was the best we found. If you need your roof replaced, don’t think twice, Will is the guy!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tian Duan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEPOWdV8dkBxW96mMFH4gTP2TATrVCAW-ZzXz04Q2qxMVzSePF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had recurring roof leaks at my old house in Abbotsford, which persisted despite multiple repairs. I consulted several roofing contractors, and one even suggested replacing the entire roof, quoting me $50k, which I found far too expensive. Last month, it leaked again after a rainstorm, so I reached out to Wilway. Although he was busy, he came by a week later and took a look.

Wilway assessed my roof, which is a metal, industrial-level one, and assured me that the roof itself had no issues. Instead, he discovered a hole in the exterior wall and identified areas of the siding that needed resealing. Last week, he arranged for his team to fix everything. This week, we had record-breaking rainfall in Greater Vancouver, and thankfully, there have been no more leaks.

Wilway did an excellent job. His pricing was very reasonable, and unlike some other contractors who were quick to suggest a full roof replacement, he focused on solving the actual problem. He even told me that if it leaks again, he’d come back and fix it for free, but only for this one time—though it seems that won’t be necessary! I highly recommend him for anyone needing an honest and reliable roofing contractor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXm-WcrQE&fid=0x0:0xf678e34f7258e075"],"When":"2024-10-20"},{"Name":"Valerie Anderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLcDc0Y0ivMEzND_x9_0a6gzS-1jKV0sDInzSCeJc6Gh7KLZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Much to my surprise I  discovered that a squirrel had taken residence in my attic. Had a pest control company come out and they installed mesh in all the areas that they thought the squirrel was making it’s way in and installed a one way door to allow the squirrel to get out but not back in. Well the squirrel was not to be deterred and proceeded to destroy my one year old roof vent to get back in. Back came the pest control company who now installed mesh over the vent with another one wet door. After getting rid of the squirrel and her two babies I now had to get my roof vent replaced. Lucky for me my neighbours we getting their roof replaced so I went over to ask Will how much he would charge me to take care of this. He said he would do it for free. Well much to my dismay, Will discovered that the pest control company had applied the mesh using a ton of staples directly into my shingles. Now it was a much bigger job!!!  Will provided a quote to replace the shingles and end caps which the pest control company agreed to cover. Will was here today and made all the necessary repairs and still did not charge me for the roof vent or it’s installation. I am very pleased with how Will came to the rescue and am very happy for his professional approach. Can’t thank him enough.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx3N_VcQ&fid=0x0:0xf678e34f7258e075"],"When":"2023-6-4"},{"Name":"jesse Eby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWD5mZOjpgQ1CNxVMQ5gpFulYbVKChzkZjFF_G6ez-N73agWH2C=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of working with Wilway Roofing, and I couldn't be more impressed with their service. A truck with the company logo was closely tailgating me on Highway 1 near Langley, the truck may have only been 3-5 feet behind my car, after I passed the semi-trucks I was driving by and letting him pass me I called the Cascade Roofing office to let them know about the rude behaviour of their driver. They took my name and number.

I received a call back about an hour later, I explained the situation to the person on the phone. They asked me if there was a line up cars behind their driver I told them there wasn't. The person on the phone then told me that next time I should change lanes sooner to avoid this. I then told the person on the phone that this wasn't an appropriate response and that they need to speak to their employee. The not-so-gentle man on the phone then tells me that it wasn't their employee but rather himself who was driving, the owner of the company.

I told him that he should learn some lessons from this and not drive like that. He then asked me if I even had a license from Canada. He tried to blame me for his bad driving.

I was born and raised in Canada, the owner is ignorant, racist and rude.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Liam Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINNkv1OWOdC7Lvabs6EXwlX2ZTL96i0wKIhiMMPH5I9fdbKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Came to Cascade today to try and start the process of getting a new metal roof. I was told they are "not taking on any new metal roofing jobs right now". Fine is there a possibility that I can start the process and at least get a quote for the future as I am not in a rush for the roof. "No I'm sorry we are too busy". Ok.....well can someone answer just a couple of questions for me? "No I'm sorry we are too busy" save your money and energy and go somewhere else where they are more concerned about a potential future customers experience. The woman that greeted me should have at least tried to seem like she cared. Sometimes a business just gets too big. I feel this might be one of those companys. Stay away

Edit: in response to your response I will say that it what I wrote is exactly what happened. You trying to change what happened is comical. I don't think any business should have to do business with anyone they don't want to or are not able to. The fact of the matter is that (in my opinion) your employees should be more concerned with how they represent your company and at least attempting to send me in the right direction or trying to answer some questions would have given me an entirely different perspective of your company. Enjoy 👍🏻","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah Warkentin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhh-TslduVnJ_IPf9iyO0v-xQsjRHLJhNTJgc1ewL9a5W10w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had roof damage from our wind storm in February, and lost some shingles. After reaching about damage from a wind/rain storm, they arranged for someone to come out very quickly—which I truly did not expect and greatly appreciated.

The technician arrived promptly, was friendly and professional, fixed the issue efficiently, and took the time to clearly explain what the problem was. This is exactly the level of service I’ve come to expect from Fraser Valley Roofing, but receiving it in the middle of flooding and windstorms, and in a remote area, went well beyond expectations.

To top it off, the rain became torrential later that day, and their quick response undoubtedly prevented much bigger issues. Outstanding service, reliability, and professionalism. Their invoices have always been reasonable as well. I would highly recommend Fraser Valley Roofing without hesitation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisa-Marie Shy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUc92UksDsWLA36Ed_S9K0UpgSEr_7nCDiXaqkABy0tR4sNv5s_Uw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Writing a review as a neighbor to the house that used Fraser Valley roofing. Firstly, this crew used my property at their convenience the whole time without the common decency to even ask. Walking up and down my driveway and backyard, hauling equipment, chucking old materials down on our side driveway etc. I work from home and have multiple cameras so each time my security notifications would go off each day. They never once contacted me. I get they have a job to do but I didn't hire them the neighbors did so asking for permission to use private property would have been the professional thing to do. I ended up going outside to share my displeasure of this not once but twice yet it fell on deaf ears. Music blaring all day, everyday. Throughout the few weeks they were next door there were multiple outbursts among the workers. One day it was so outrageous my other neighbor txt me asking wth was going on next door! Yelling, swearing (c word) and berating a young worker. Even throwing things at him from above. They finally finished (thank God), I just went outback to take my dog out as I had to use the front yard while they were here to not spook my dog. I am appalled at what they left behind IN MY YARD!! I didn't have my roof done yet I have broken shingles, plastic, old gloves and upon a quick look gathered a sandwich bag FULL OF RUSTY NAILS AND RUSTY METAL IN MY YARD!!! Not only is this a danger to us and our dog but also our vehicles that we drive down to get to the backyard!!! What kind of company leaves a mess for the neighbors to clean up after them?!?! I would not hesitate to recommend Stattonrock for any home construction needs.

Chris and Sandy Britten","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shadrin Storness-Bliss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYscJef_dinwrcPnJG3F28lTG4yDODK7BxxisXczmoFdxcaA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Warning: Do Not Hire Stattonrock or Dan

If you’re thinking about hiring Stattonrock for a renovation project or a new build, I urge you to read this first. I rarely write reviews, but after what my family went through, I feel an obligation to speak up — in the hope that it might spare someone else the stress, financial loss, and frustration we experienced.

We hired Stattonrock to handle the plumbing for a full home renovation. What followed was a complete disaster — both in terms of the workmanship and the way we were treated throughout the process.

One morning, Stattonrock’s plumbing crew showed up to work on our house with zero prior notice. We were still in bed and had to scramble to get ready — and they charged us for the time they waited in the driveway, even though they knew we hadn’t been told they were coming. That moment alone should’ve been a red flag, but unfortunately, things only got worse from there.

After the work was completed, we started having serious issues throughout the house. The toilets didn’t flush properly. Gas lines were incorrectly sized. Taps were hooked up to nothing. One of the bathtubs was installed crooked. And the most alarming issue: a tankless water heater and recirculating system that was so badly installed that hot water came out of the cold taps, and water temperatures would randomly spike or drop.

This system actually burned my daughter’s hand while brushing her teeth with what was supposed to be cold water. We informed Dan, the owner of Stattonrock, and his response? “You seem fishy. Our plumbing division no longer exists. Contact our lawyer.” That was the moment I realized just how little this company cared about accountability — or our family’s wellbeing.

We had some hope when Dan agreed to bring in another company to assess and repair the issues. That company was shocked by what they found. They confirmed that the plumbing was not up to code, improperly graded, and seriously flawed in multiple areas. They began making the necessary repairs — but then Dan refused to pay them and stopped communicating with both us and the repair company altogether.

We even tried to speak with him face-to-face at his Abbotsford office in the hopes of having a respectful conversation. We were allowed in — only to be told our calls were being blocked and we’d need to speak to their lawyer. Still no repairs. Still no refund. And to this day, the plumbing in our home remains incomplete and faulty.

Dan, the owner of Stattonrock, is not someone you can trust.
He comes across as professional and caring at first — but once you’ve paid, that disappears. He avoids responsibility, deflects blame, and hides behind legal threats instead of doing what any honest business owner should: make it right.

If this is how he ran his plumbing division, I can only imagine what it would be like dealing with their framing, electrical, or drywall services. He has shown no integrity, no accountability, and no concern for the families who put their trust in his company.

We deeply regret hiring Stattonrock.
There are plenty of reputable, reliable contractors out there — this is not one of them. If you value your time, your money, and your peace of mind, please stay away from this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob and Carissa Youssef","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIW5-O2HHtNZiQOHIxFn-yuj6RmXSEJgoyDdt4466wJcudHsw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I used Stattonrock Design + Build to build our dream home and it’s even better than we had hoped. The quality workmanship and their commitment to excellence is visible in every detail of the house. We loved working with their design team who helped us make choices that brought our vision to life and were within our budget. Their team is professional, patient and proud of their craft. We highly recommend working with the Stattonrock team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUypj-EyRE3CK79meFXHzX706dbKKzABOogt108XUKeQfC5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Choosing Stattonrock to build our home was one of the best decisions we could have made for our growing family. From the moment we made our partnership official, to the day we received our keys, we felt stress free and confident in our decision. They listened to what we envisioned, gave thoughtful recommendations and delivered beyond our expectations. They are professional, detailed and thorough with their communication which helps to ensure that everyone is on the same page throughout the process. Our home is stunning and we are so in love with every feature, right down to the smallest detail. This is a home that our family can make memories in, and we have the entire team to thank for that. We would have no hesitation to recommend Stattonrock to our closest family and friends - they are the best!","Images":null,"When":""}]
